column6: New DVD - DEVILS DOUBLE - Dominic Cooper, "Black Prince" Uday Hussein
column7: Based on a gripping, unbelievable true story of money, power and opulent decadence, Lionsgate’s THE DEVIL’S DOUBLE takes a white- knuckle ride deep into the lawless playground of excess and violence known as Baghdad, 1987. Summoned from the frontline to Saddam Hussein's palace, Iraqi army lieutenant Latif Yahia (Dominic Cooper) is thrust into the highest echelons of the "royal family" when he’s ordered to become the ‘fiday’ – or body double – to Saddam's son, the notorious "Black Prince" Uday Hussein (also Dominic Cooper), a reckless, sadistic party-boy with a rabid hunger for sex and brutality. With his and his family’s lives at stake, Latif must surrender his former self forever as he learns to walk, talk and act like Uday. But nothing could have prepared him for the horror of the Black Prince’s psychotic, drug-addled life of fast cars, easy women and impulsive violence. With one wrong move costing him his life, Latif forges an intimate bond with Sarrab (Ludivine Sagnier), Uday's seductive mistress who’s haunted by her own secrets. But as war looms with Kuwait and Uday’s depraved gangster regime threatens to destroy them all, Latif realizes that escape from the devil’s den will only come at the highest possible cost.

column7: Three to Tango (DVD, 2000, Widescreen/Full Screen) NEW Don't Forget To Check Out All Our Other DVD / Blu-Ray / TV Show Listings! Your mom loves Free Shipping.  Say what? Yep you heard us. You know she does, we know she does, that’s why it’s free.  Let us break this down for you. You order 2 items, Yep, Free Shipping. You order 4 items, guess what, shipping is $100,  just kidding, still free shipping. We are more than happy to give larger discounts on shipping, but come on, we are no math geniuses, but we are sure you know 75% off free, is still free. Getting your items out within 1 business day is always our goal.  Your mom wants it shipped out fast, and so do we. Our Economy shipping is Free.  We know, you're not always in a hurry to get your stuff, and you want the best price, so economy goes via media mail.  We do have a expedited option, for about the price of a soda, that would get your item sent via First Class mail, that’s right, we ain’t using no second class, or third class like some people on the Titanic.  If you do get a soda instead of paying for First Class shipping, just know, more than likely you won’t receive it before your done drinking your soda. Everyone loves tracking, especially your mom.  We put tracking on everything. Almost all our items are shipped via USPS (hats off to you USPS Man for taking our items cross country for about the price of a gallon a gas).  I know I can’t drive it to you on only a gallon of gas so we leave it up to them to figure out how to do that. Once it is shipped, eBay will email you the tracking number that is like 4 million digits long and if memorized will bring you great knowledge just like Thanos (but please don’t snap your fingers).  This number, when punched into the USPS website, will give you all kinds of info, but once in a blue moon they do miss a scan. (Come on USPS, be more reliable scanning those 600 million pieces of mail a day) I'm only kidding, but we do have to cut them some slack sometimes and wait until your media arrives at the next city to get scanned. Your mom doesn’t want to come here.  So guess what, we will ship your item for free, so you don’t have to come pick it up.  It’s a warehouse. It’s a big metally thing, with nothing pretty about it. We barely enjoy coming here, but for you, we will.  So let us concentrate on what we do best, and that’s shipping your stuff for free. Returns Happen.  We get it. Big Thank You to you because, if you have a return, that means you're our customer.  If you don’t want it for any reason, then quite frankly, we don’t want you to have it. So when you want to return something, please send us a message through ebay before opening a request, we are here to take care of it as quickly as possible.
